item.title: About
item.description:
Contact

  • wngp dot finished408 at aleeas dot com

Feel free to send your complaints that there is no evidence of A. H. knowing about Endlösung der Judenfrage.

GPG keys

You can send encrypted files to me with GNU Privacy Guard.
GPG

XMR

My Monero wallet.
XMR: 47Ka9qsmZML7C1s2NnhuRmYLu124s8P7McCKAGcYzyENA5DRmVYjvorAKcYtSziG4E3UUQRmAk6isPctgtCxdJ2ZLyuTS6V

src=ericmurphy.xyz

item.title: Cloud content.
item.description:
There is place for social media replacements but you’re in wrong place.

content archive(tar.gz)

TOR onion

Tips:

  • decompress with PeaZip, 7-zip, material files(android) or gnu tar
  • On android open html with markor or ghost commander.
  • On desktop drag and drop html from your file manager to browser.
